compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add scrutiny:pending gate to preplanning and implementation-plan
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add a scrutiny:pending tag check at the entry of both skills:

### Preplanning SKILL.md
Insert a 'Scrutiny Gate' section BEFORE Phase 1 (before any planning logic). The gate:
1. Reads the epic's tags via `.claude/scripts/dso ticket show <epic-id>` and checks for 'scrutiny:pending' in the tags field
2. If present: HALT immediately with message: 'This epic has not been through scrutiny review. Run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> first to complete the scrutiny pipeline, then retry /dso:preplanning.'
3. If absent: proceed normally (no change to existing behavior)
4. Use presence-based check — only block when tag IS present. Existing epics without the tag field should NOT be blocked.

### Implementation-plan SKILL.md
Insert the same gate section BEFORE Step 1 (Contextual Discovery). Same logic and message, adapted for the skill name.

### Remove .test-index RED marker

SAFEGUARD FILE: Both SKILL.md files are protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Preplanning contains scrutiny:pending check
  Verify: grep -q 'scrutiny:pending' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Implementation-plan contains scrutiny:pending check
  Verify: grep -q 'scrutiny:pending' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
